tender.description: Karyakari Abhiyanta kr. 1 Swarget Panipuravtha Karyalayantargat Yenarya Sukhasagar nagar bhag 2, sai nagar, shivshambho nagar, gokulnagar, rajmata kolani ya bhagat v etr parisarat jalavahinyanchi dainandin dekhabhal durustichi kame karne.
